supported_claims.statement: After editable install, pytest voluptuous/tests/tests.py passes with the new Required(Any(...)) tests asserting positive validation, missing-key error, custom message, mixed types, multiple complex requirements, and value validation.

warnings: Pass 2 forward: the supported claim is intentionally scoped to 'the new Required(Any(...)) public-API surface is usable as demonstrated by the bundled tests' — it is NOT a claim about wider voluptuous correctness or absence of unrelated bugs. Diagnostic only.
